nodes.name: CanvaTextElementFetcher
nodes.description: Fetch text element from Canva via fabric, validate type, verify tenant ownership

nodes.name: CoordinateNormalizer
nodes.description: Transform pixel coordinates to percentage-based layout (0-100)

nodes.name: StylePropertyConverter
nodes.description: Normalize font, color, and spacing properties to canonical schema

nodes.name: ElementTypeMapper
nodes.description: Map Canva element types to XIIGen canonical element type via FREEDOM config

nodes.name: TransformationRecorder
nodes.description: Store transformation metadata and audit trail to xiigen-element-transform index

nodes.name: MetadataAggregator
nodes.description: Combine all normalized properties into complete xiigen-element-metadata record

nodes.name: ExportReadinessGate
nodes.description: Validate all transformations complete, emit TextElementExportReady for downstream consumers

nodes.name: OutboxPublisher
nodes.description: Emit CloudEvents to queue fabric after all storage operations (DNA-8 outbox pattern)
